name: The Changeling Empressdom
description:
Well hello! It's been a while, but I am finally going to fully remaster the bot. First on the agenda is to allow a proxy, which has already been done.

Expect updates to the bot itself. Thank you for your patience.

26/5/2026: Changed the name of the Changeling nation to the Greater Changeling Empressdom, and changed the title of Chrysalis to Empress Chrysalis, plus a few other smaller lore fixes and revisions.

15/5/2026: expanded and fixed the Lore behind the bot again, this time fleshing out some background systems and logic, as well removed unnecessary systems that created situations that most Users would find unnecessary and annoying.



23/7/2025: expanded the Lore behind the bot, so it is now better explained and expanded. Of course, I have also added backgrounds to some of the characters, some of them light and merely informational, and others more complete.

They are Anthro; I have always written and thought of my bots as Anthro.

This is a fan project to have more EAW bots in here. It is WIP and will be expanded as I put more effort into it.

I will give a fair warning: this bot has strong themes, so when a user uses the bot, they will automatically consent to acts that could cause distress or anger in people. I have decided to say this to make sure that everyone who uses it knows what they are getting into.

PS: I have also adapted the story to the theme I am going for, so a fair warning.
creator: Euphoria001
